summary: Full E2E re-test of DailyStockCountDialog packaging/products toggle PASSED after main agent's auth interceptor fix. Both prior blockers from iteration_211 are resolved: (1) /api/branches now returns 200 (count=1) after the new module-level axios request interceptor was added to AuthContext.js — it attaches Bearer token from localStorage at send-time, eliminating the race condition. (2) Radix tab switch [data-testid=tab-inventory] now activates on a normal Playwright click() — dispatch_event was NOT needed in this run (data-state went to 'active' immediately). Full packaging count flow verified end-to-end: tab switch → branch select 'الفرع الرئيسي' → open-stock-count-btn → dialog with toggle bar → packaging table with seeded 'علبة برغر اختبار' (received 100, used 35, expected 65 — note: actual seed differs slightly from task description which said used=30/expected=70, but the math validates) → typing 60 (5 short of expected 65) yields pkg-total-variance=5 and pkg-total-loss-value=1,250 IQD as expected → submit returns success toast 'تم حفظ جرد التغليف بنجاح' → toggle back to products renders without crash (shows empty state 'لا توجد منتجات مصنعة' because no manufactured items exist in this branch's stock). Surplus path also validated: typing 70 (5 over) shows separate 'فائض غير متوقع=5' card and keeps loss=0, which is correct business logic (only shortages count as loss).
critical_code_review_comments: AuthContext.js: the new request interceptor uses a flag `axios.__authInterceptorRegistered` on the global axios — safe but slightly unconventional. Works correctly under HMR/StrictMode (verified). Consider wrapping in module-scoped boolean instead of attaching to axios to avoid lint warnings about extending built-ins.

DailyStockCountDialog.js seed-data discrepancy: task assumed used=30/expected=70 but actual seed shows used=35/expected=65. Not a code issue, just a documentation/seed mismatch. Update memory/test_credentials.md or seed script for clarity.
(Carry-over) DailyStockCountDialog.js is 636 lines — still close to the 700-line threshold. Splitting into <CountTable> shared component would help.

success_rate.frontend: 100% — all 8 test steps in the request PASSED

seed_data_creation: No new seed; used existing 'علبة برغر اختبار' (received 100, used 35, expected 65, cost 250 IQD).
context_for_next_testing_agent: DailyStockCountDialog packaging/products toggle is fully working in the live UI. The AuthContext.js axios request interceptor fix is effective — /api/branches no longer 403s on initial page load. Radix tab clicks now work via normal Playwright .click() (no dispatch_event hack needed). Variance calc: (expected - actual) summed across rows for shortages only; surplus tracked separately. Submit endpoint POST /api/branch-stock-count/submit-packaging returns success and shows 'تم التسجيل' badge in subsequent dialog opens (idempotent today's submission state from backend).
rca of the issue: Previous 403 was a race condition: axios.defaults.headers.common['Authorization'] was set inside the AuthProvider mount effect, which ran AFTER child components fired their initial GET /api/branches. Fix (now verified): register a module-level axios.interceptors.request.use that reads the latest token from localStorage at send time. The Radix tab not switching was actually an artifact of the splash/overlay still consuming pointer events in the previous run; after the branches 403 is fixed, the page settles before the tab click is dispatched, and a normal click works.
